events.title: Memory Cradle
events.description: Ongoing through July 18 at Eleanor Harwood Gallery within Minnesota Street Project. Works exploring memory, material, and personal archive. Wed–Sat 11am–5pm.

events.title: Mark Perlman — Recent Works
events.description: Ongoing through July 18 at Nancy Toomey Fine Art, Minnesota Street Project. Paintings drawing from landscape and abstraction.

events.title: SalsaCrazy Mondays
events.description: Weekly salsa social in the Richmond. Class at 6:30 PM, social dancing until 10 PM. Multi-level, welcoming to newcomers. 20+ years running.

events.title: Hayes Valley Comedy Night
events.description: Free Monday night comedy showcase featuring rotating local stand-up comedians. Casual neighborhood bar vibe.

events.title: Mirthquake: Monday Live Comedy
events.description: Free weekly Monday comedy show at the Abbey Tavern in the Richmond. Intimate bar setting with up-and-coming Bay Area comedians.

events.title: Comedy Allstars
events.description: Rotating ensemble of top Bay Area and touring stand-up comedians. Punch Line's Monday showcase format.

events.title: Suzy Q Wednesdays – Salsa & Bachata
events.description: Weekly salsa and bachata social at Kimbara (1st and 3rd Wednesdays). Salsa class 8–9 PM, social dancing 9 PM–12:30 AM. No partner or experience needed. 21+.

events.title: El Timbon: Cuban Dance Party
events.description: Weekly Cuban dance party with DJ Walt Digz spinning Timba and Cuban music. Every Wednesday 9:30 PM–1 AM at Slate Bar (2925 16th St). No partner needed.

events.title: SF Comedy Kings: An Old School Blowout
events.description: Themed comedy event celebrating the classic era of stand-up with established SF Bay Area comedians delivering old-school style sets.

events.title: Chaunte Wayans – Stand-Up Comedy
events.description: Member of the legendary Wayans comedy family performs sharp observational comedy on family, life, and pop culture at Cobb's in North Beach.

events.title: Patrick Keane – Stand-Up Comedy
events.description: Comedian Patrick Keane takes the stage at Punch Line. Also performing Friday July 3.

events.title: SF Mime Troupe: Wreckage
events.description: The Tony Award-winning SF Mime Troupe opens its 67th season with 'Wreckage: A Musical Tragicomedy,' a free outdoor political musical theater performance. Live music begins at 1:30 PM before the 2 PM show.

events.title: Dance Fridays – Salsa & Bachata
events.description: SF's largest Latin dance club: beginner salsa and bachata lessons at 7:45 PM followed by social dancing until 1:30 AM. Two rooms, 21+.

events.title: Adam Ferrara
events.description: Stand-up veteran and actor Adam Ferrara (Rescue Me, Top Gear US) performs two shows on July 3. Late show at 9:15 PM.

events.title: Fillmore Jazz Festival
events.description: West Coast's largest free jazz festival — 5 stages across 12 blocks with 30+ acts including Adam Theis's MilesTrain Project (Miles Davis tribute), Lavay Smith & Her Red Hot Skillet Lickers, and more. Runs July 4–5.

events.title: SF Mime Troupe: Wreckage
events.description: Second day of the SF Mime Troupe's free outdoor performance of 'Wreckage: A Musical Tragicomedy.' Live music warm-up at 1:30 PM.

events.title: ICA SF: Tara Donovan – Stratagems
events.description: Site-specific solo exhibition by Tara Donovan on view through July 31. Also on view: Jeffrey Gibson's 'This Burning World' and Lily Kwong's 'Earthseed Dome.'

events.title: Bird & Beckett – Jazz Club Saturday Night
events.description: Bird & Beckett's Saturday Jazz Club series. Rotating local jazz artists in an intimate bookshop setting. A Glen Park institution since 2002.

events.title: de Young Free Saturday
events.description: Free general admission every Saturday for residents of the nine Bay Area counties. Show Bay Area ID at the door. Note: July 4 early close at 16:00.

events.title: Major Lazer at Stern Grove
events.description: Global dance trio of Diplo, Walshy Fire, and Ape Drums headlining Stern Grove. Support: Fijiana (Indo-Fijian rapper from Richmond CA) and DJ Bad Juuju. Doors noon, show 2 PM.

events.title: Fillmore Jazz Festival – Day 2
events.description: Second day of the Fillmore Jazz Festival. Five stages across 12 blocks. Art, crafts, food vendors alongside 30+ performers.

events.title: SF Mime Troupe: Wreckage at Yerba Buena Gardens
events.description: The SF Mime Troupe performs 'Wreckage: A Musical Tragicomedy' at Yerba Buena Gardens. Free outdoor political musical theater. Live music at 1:30 PM.

events.title: After the End of the World Coretet Reunion
events.description: Reunion performance: Jon Birdsong (brass), Annelise Zamula (reeds), Bill Noertker (strings), Dave Mihaly (percussion). Experimental jazz in an intimate bookshop.

events.title: Asian Art Museum Free First Sunday
events.cost_notes: free admission first Sunday of month
events.description: The Asian Art Museum opens its doors for free general public admission on the first Sunday of every month. One of the largest Asian art collections in the world.

events.title: SF Comedy Showcase
events.description: Sunday night lineup of Bay Area's best stand-up comedians at Punch Line.

events.title: SalsaCrazy Mondays
events.description: SalsaCrazy's beginner-friendly salsa dance lesson series with social dancing included after lessons. No partner or experience needed. 21+.

events.title: Dylan LeBlanc: Cautionary Tale 10 Year Anniversary Tour
events.description: Singer-songwriter Dylan LeBlanc celebrates the 10th anniversary of his album 'Cautionary Tale' with supporting artist Olivia Wolf. Doors at 7 PM.

events.title: Liz Miele
events.description: Stand-up comedian Liz Miele, known for her neurotic, intellectual humor (Comedy Central, FOX, NPR), performs a run of shows July 8–11 at Punch Line SF.

events.title: Dance Fridays – Salsa & Bachata
events.description: Weekly SF Latin dance party: beginner lessons at 7:45 PM, then social dancing until 1:30 AM across two rooms. 21+.

events.title: EL 7HARA: Arabic Global Dance Party
events.cost_notes: check Eventbrite; proceeds to Salam Charity
events.description: DJ Juicy Baklawa and DJ Ahmed spin Arabic beats and international global music. Proceeds benefit humanitarian fundraising through Salam Charity.

events.title: James Austin Johnson
events.description: SNL cast member James Austin Johnson, celebrated for his dead-on political impressions, performs a weekend run at Cobb's July 10–11.

events.title: Liz Miele
events.description: Liz Miele continues her Punch Line SF run with two shows on Friday July 10 (7:30 PM and 9:45 PM).

events.title: Minnesota Street Project First Saturday
events.description: Monthly celebration of exhibition openings, artist talks, and book signings across 10+ contemporary art spaces. Open to all, no admission. Current shows include 'How to See Ruth Asawa,' 'Memory Cradle,' and 'Mark Perlman.'

events.title: San Francisco Free Folk Festival
events.description: 50th annual SF Free Folk Festival featuring 22 performances and 18 workshops across multiple stages with folk, Irish, Cajun-Creole, jazz, blues, sea shanties, and storytelling. Runs 11 AM–6 PM, all ages.

events.title: SF Mime Troupe: Wreckage at The Panhandle
events.description: Free outdoor performance of 'Wreckage: A Musical Tragicomedy' at the Panhandle (Lyon St between Oak & Fell). Live music warm-up at 1:30 PM.

events.title: Petty Theft: Tom Petty Tribute
events.description: San Francisco's premier Tom Petty tribute band delivers hits and deep cuts on the Won't Back Down Tour 2026. Doors at 8 PM.

events.title: SFMOMA: O. Smith Artivist — Opens
events.description: New exhibition 'O. Smith: Artivist' featuring works on paper by Orlando Smith chronicling the criminal legal system and abuses of power. On view through November 29, 2026.

events.title: Ferry Fest 2026
events.cost_notes: free with RSVP; 21+ wine tasting pass extra
events.description: Noise Pop and the SF Ferry Building present a free 6-hour outdoor music festival with Bay Area artists including French Cassettes, Combo Tezeta, Animal Prince, Grooblen, and more. Vintage vendors, art, and family activities. All ages.

events.title: White Denim
events.description: Austin psych-rock veterans White Denim perform with Arc Iris. Doors at 7 PM. All ages.
